decision_nodes.excerpt: TACE recommended; consider systemic therapy if TACE-refractory or progression after 2 cycles.
Atezolizumab + Bevacizumab preferred (Child-Pugh A); Tremelimumab + Durvalumab alternative.
Regorafenib / Cabozantinib / Ramucirumab (AFP>=400) / Nivolumab+Ipilimumab depending on prior therapy.
